'''Kira Lar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] around the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Shortly before the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]], she was preparing to join the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Despite her extensive natural talent in naval strategy, being a woman meant that she would have likely remained a junior officer for her entire career. Upon learning of [[Alderaan/Legends|her]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] destruction, she and several other Alderaanians with whom she traveled made the last-minute decision to defect to the Rebel Alliance. She served with distinction at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] and [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]] as a military attaché to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], helping him to coordinate operations.<ref name="wotc" />
